backend/main.mo: Motoko actor managing user profiles and service inquiries with access‑controlled CRUD and admin-only inquiry retrieval/search.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing implemented website features, related files, components, tests, and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Text file containing short descriptions of major frontend components, pages, hooks, and config files.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base stylesheet defining OKLCH color variables for light/dark themes and applying global background and text styles.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry file providing the root div and loading the React app via main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Configures TanStack Router with routes for all main pages and renders the RouterProvider.
frontend/src/components/SiteFooter.tsx: Website footer with branding, navigation links, contact prompt, and attribution section.
frontend/src/components/SiteHeader.tsx: Responsive header with logo, nav links, active-state highlighting, mobile menu, and CTA button.
frontend/src/components/SiteLayout.tsx: Shared layout component including header, routed page content, and footer.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook creating and managing authenticated/anonymous backend actors, reinitializing on identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides React context and hooks for managing Internet Identity authentication using AuthClient, including login, logout, and stored identity loading.
frontend/src/hooks/useSubmitInquiry.ts: Defines a React Query mutation that submits an inquiry through a backend actor and invalidates the inquiries query on success.
frontend/src/index.css: Configures Tailwind CSS layers and defines light/dark theme CSS variables for colors, borders, and UI styling.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Bootstraps the React app, wrapping it with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AboutPage.tsx: Renders the About page with sections describing mission, values, and process using styled UI components.
frontend/src/pages/ContactPage.tsx: Implements a contact form that submits inquiries via useSubmitInquiry and displays success or error alerts.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Displays the homepage with hero content, service features, benefits, and navigation actions using styled components.
frontend/src/pages/PricingPage.tsx: Renders the Pricing page with three pricing tiers, feature lists, and styled cards using Tailwind and UI components.
frontend/src/pages/ServicesPage.tsx: Defines the Services page with core and additional service sections, each showing icons, descriptions, and deliverables.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides helper functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters with sessionStorage fallback.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Configures Tailwind theme, colors, typography, animations, and plugin setup for the frontend.
project_state.json: Tracks project state, implemented features, and requirements for the Ethical Bytes website build.
